'''Eniknar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] who was the Chief of Security at the [[Esfandia Long-Range Communications Base]]. He was believed to be the traitor at the base until he willingly [[Death/Legends|sacrificed his life]] to destroy an antenna after the console was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
